## How Mangobot's Humanoid Robots Are Changing Events in the UAE

The UAE events industry operates at a tier where originality is a baseline expectation. Clients have seen elaborate production values, cutting-edge audiovisual, and celebrity appearances. They are looking for what comes next.

An increasing number of event companies, brands, and organisations across Dubai and the GCC have found that answer with Mangobot. Through our humanoid robot rental service, we give event professionals and end clients access to the most advanced embodied humanoids available in the region, deployed end-to-end by Mangobot's own team, with zero technical burden on your side.

Discover our events portfolio [here](/events)

## What Humanoid Robots Can Do at Your Event

# Guest Welcome and Front Desk - Fully Customized

The A2 Ultra operates as an intelligent host, greeting guests in 20+ languages, answering event questions, and guiding attendees autonomously through venues. For conferences, galas, and corporate events, the first impression a humanoid host creates stays with guests long after the day ends.

# MC, Co-Host, and Brand Ambassador

Both the A2 Ultra and X2 Ultra can be programmed through Mangobot's LinkSoul platform with a fully customised persona, voice, and brand knowledge base. A robot MC delivers scripted segments, interacts with audiences in real time, and adapts to the tone of any event. As a brand ambassador on a venue floor, it engages guests in consistent, on-message conversations and generates social content wherever it stands.

# Performance and Flash Mobs

The X2 Series was built to perform. With fluid choreography, custom dance routines, and the ability to synchronise multiple units in a coordinated fleet performance, it delivers the kind of moment that stops a crowd and fills social feeds. Multi-robot flash mob activations are among the most requested formats from event clients across the region.

# VIP and Exclusive Events

For events where exclusivity is the proposition, **private galas, luxury launches, VIP receptions,** humanoid robots offer something genuinely rare. Personalised guest recognition, premium interaction design, and the prestige of hosting the most advanced robots available in the region all contribute to an experience clients remember and actively talk about.

## The Operational Reality

The most common concern we hear from event professionals is operational complexity. Who runs the robot on the day? What if something goes wrong? How do you customize it for a specific event or brand?

**Mangobot handles all of it.** Every deployment includes a professional Mangobot technician on site, full pre-event customisation through LinkSoul, and transport logistics managed by our team. Event companies and clients do not need technical expertise. You add the humanoid robot to your offering, **we handle the rest.**

## Proven Across the Region

Mangobot's humanoid robots have been deployed across a wide range of events in the UAE, spanning sport, luxury, charity, immersive art, education, healthcare, and brand activations. Through channel partnerships with leading venues including the Theatre of Digital Art (TODA) and TheArsenale, Mangobot has established a presence at some of Dubai's most prestigious locations.

See our past deployments and event highlights with our channel partners [here](/partnerships#partner-toda)

> *For developer: clicking the partnership link takes users directly to the TODA section.*

## Why Act Now

The UAE's events market is moving fast. Client demand for robotics-driven experiences is growing, the competitive window for being among the first to offer this is still open, and the infrastructure to deliver it **through Mangobot** is already in place.

The businesses setting the benchmark today are the ones clients call first tomorrow.
